narrative:
South Euclid-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,138 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 41.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 35.4 percentage points.
